body.title: De-duplicate SCOPE_GUARD / pe_chain block notifications — stop the echo loop
body.result: Added dedup_key + window params to channel_post.post_to_channel (default 30min). scope_guard MEDIUM posts + pe_chain blocked posts now pass stable keys. pe_chain._post_to_channel consolidated into thin wrapper around shared utility. Suppressed posts logged as CHANNEL_POST_SUPPRESSED for audit. 7 new tests + 25 total green. Commit d121605f. Root-cause loop (habit re-firing the same blocked op) is a separate follow-up — should be filed as T-scope-guard-reattempt-loop if the echo-suppression alone doesn't quiet things.
body.description:
Igor is stuck in an echo loop: the same triplet of block messages fires to the shared channel every 10-60 minutes and keeps bumping him back to the same goal. Akien 2026-04-18b: 'message repetition and echo is driving him bonkers.'

## The triplet
Observed >6 times in recent channel history:
1. [SCOPE_GUARD] MEDIUM inertia: wild_igor/igor/cognition/thalamus.py — write. Rationale: none provided.
2. [pe_chain] ✗ unknown: blocked after 0 attempts. Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/kernel.py. Needs human review.
3. [pe_chain] ✗ unknown: blocked after 0 attempts. Reason: HIGH inertia delete requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/memory/models.py. Needs human review.

Firing at: 08:00, 09:08, 09:17, 00:31, 06:46, 06:58, 07:08 (UTC), and continuing. Periodic re-attempts of the same blocked operation.

## Root cause (two layers)
- **Symptom layer (echo):** SCOPE_GUARD and pe_chain both post to the channel on every attempt without checking 'have I posted this same block message recently?'. Same (file, action) tuple → same message → spam.
- **Cause layer (re-attempt):** a habit or goal is repeatedly trying the same HIGH-inertia write. Suppressing the echo doesn't stop the underlying re-attempt — it just silences the noise. Both layers need attention, but fixing the echo first is the quick win.

## Scope (this ticket — symptom only)
1. Find the channel-post sites for SCOPE_GUARD and pe_chain block messages (grep for '[SCOPE_GUARD]' and '[pe_chain] ✗').
2. Add a de-dup cache keyed on (message_type, file_path, action). If the same tuple posted within DEDUP_WINDOW_MINUTES (default 30), skip the channel post. Still log to instance_log.jsonl for audit.
3. Reset the dedup cache on Igor boot so a restart gives Akien fresh visibility.
4. Test: simulate 3 rapid pe_chain blocks on the same (file, action) — only one channel post; a different (file, action) still posts.

## Scope (explicitly NOT this ticket)
- Stopping the underlying re-attempt loop. That's a separate ticket — file as T-scope-guard-reattempt-loop if diagnosis reveals a stuck goal/habit.

## Success criteria
- Channel traffic for SCOPE_GUARD/pe_chain drops dramatically (from triplet-every-hour to at-most-once-per-30min-per-tuple)
- Akien + Igor both report the noise level is tolerable
- No loss of audit info (still in instance_log)
- Tests pass

## Provenance
Observed during /readigor in session 2026-04-18b. Akien-flagged as 'driving him bonkers.'
